reason: Both answers reach the same correct, well-reasoned conclusion with nearly identical redline priorities (liability cap at 12mo fees, IP indemnity scoping, consequential damages waiver, don't walk over boilerplate, lawyer review). B adds a genuinely new practical lever (E&O/cyber insurance to support accepting a higher cap) and a slightly more accurate walk-away trigger; A adds a more explicit mutual-indemnity ask for the customer's data/misuse. These small unique contributions roughly offset each other, and neither contains a factual or reasoning error. Overall comparable quality.
